artifact: SourceCheckup Medical Benchmark Source Support Worksheet
status: public worksheet for benchmark adjacent source support review

source_signals.name: BRIDGE article
source_signals.checked_signal: published on 17 June 2026 and describes 87 tasks from 59 real world clinical data sources across 9 languages, 8 task types, and 14 clinical specialties

source_signals.name: MedHELM
source_signals.checked_signal: describes 121 clinical tasks, 22 subcategories, 31 datasets, and 5 categories

source_signals.name: HealthBench
source_signals.checked_signal: describes 5000 realistic health conversations, physician written rubrics, 262 physicians from 60 countries, multilingual and multi turn scenarios, and detailed rubric criteria

public_use_rules: source existence and source support are separate states
benchmark public pages are context unless a formal benchmark result is actually present and cleared
do not copy benchmark examples, answer keys, hidden prompts, protected examples, private clinical text, or patient data
do not describe source support as source truth certification
do not publish if support state, uncertainty state, reviewer role, allowed wording, blocked claim, escalation route, or stop condition is missing
next_public_action: Turkish medical LLM coverage pressure addendum
